Title: [Internal] Configuring Account Permissions
Content:
The Product Permissions page serves as the centralized control hub for managing a merchant's active features. This interface allows internal administrators to toggle core financial functionalities on or off for specific accounts.

  • Real-Time Activation: Settings are applied immediately upon being toggled. Merchants only need to refresh their dashboard to see the changes reflected in their account.

  • Environment Segregation: Controls are split between Live and Test environments to allow for safe integration and testing before going live.

Core Permissions

The dashboard features several high-level toggles for basic account operations:

Balance

  • Controls the ability to view the balance page

  • Controls the ability to add new balance within the settings page

    • Typical usecase: Escrow accounts should not have the ability to see balance

Withdraw

  • Controls the ability to see withdrawal button on the Home and Balance page

    • Typical usecase: Remittance customer that is not allowed to withdraw

Top Up

  • Controls the ability to see the top up button on the Home and Balance page

Convert

  • Controls the ability to see the convert button on the Home and Balance page

    • Typical usecase: PG Merchant that should not be allowed to convert their money coming in

Money In

These settings control which payment methods are available to the merchant. Toggling these enables/disables the specific tabs in the merchant dashboard and grants/revokes API access for that method.

Category

Permission Flag

Functionality

Default

Virtual Account

VA page, ability to create VA payments

Default

Credit Card

Credit card page, ability to create credit card payments

Default

E-wallet

Digital wallet payments (e.g., OVO, DANA).

Default

Paylater

Installment-based "Buy Now, Pay Later" services.

Default

Direct Debit

Automated pulls from a customer's linked bank account.

Default

Retail Outlet

Over-the-counter payments at physical stores.

Default

Invoice

Access to the Xendit hosted payment link/invoice page.

Default

Recurring / Unified

Subscription billing and centralized payment routing.

Additional

Remittance v1 & v2

Currently only used for Wise, to be deprecated

Additional

Dispute

Access to the chargeback and dispute tab in the merchant dashboard

Money Out (Payouts & Remittances)

When configuring the individual flags for Money Out, the following definitions apply based on API version and merchant type:

Product Permission

Target User

Deprecation Status

Payout v1

/disbursements - IDR domestic payouts only.

ID merchants only

✅ Yes

/payouts - Regional/Global use; any currency.

Any merchants

❌ No

Batch Payout v2

Legacy regional batch payouts (SEA corridors).

Local merchants

✅ Yes

Batch Payout v3

Global batch payout for any corridor.

Any merchants

❌ No

Remittance v1/v2

/remittances - Licensed inbound instructions.

Licensed FinInst

✅ Yes

Payout Link v1

/payout - IDR inbound instructions only.

ID merchants

✅ Yes

Payout Link v3

/payout_links - Regional/Global use.

Local merchants
